text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way back to campus with Fuji Kiseki
when I realize something terrible.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You lost your phone?!

I empty my bag and pockets, but my phone is
nowhere to be seen.

My blood runs cold when I remember all the
confidential information from Tracen that's stored
in it.
choice_data_list: I'll be in big trouble if that information leaks!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I bet... We'd better find it, and fast!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, don't you have a tablet that's synced to
your phone?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's an app you can use to track down your
lost phone if you're logged into the same account
on both devices!

As I have my tablet with me, I take it out of my
bag, download the app in question, and enter my
information.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh! The map's loaded!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It looks like your phone's in a park... maybe? It
seems to be moving around...

I squint at the screen and, sure enough, the dot
indicating my phone's location is moving about.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Maybe someone's picked it up. But it doesn't look
like they're taking it to a police station or a lost
and found...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We might have to chase them down if they're
some baddie trying to steal your phone. Hang on,
I'll get changed!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Au contraire! It's always better to be safe than
sorry! Let's head over once I've changed!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right, we're here! But... I don't see anyone who
looks like a dastardly thief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the only thing we can do now is ask
around.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meeeow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello! What a darling kitty! Say, have you
seen a smartphone lying about anywh—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Nothing, just... look at what it's dragging around.

Sure enough, there's a very familiar phone on a
very familiar lanyard in its mouth.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So it is yours! I thought I'd seen it before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I can't believe it, but our phone thief is a
cat! I've never seen a more adorable thief!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But there's no time to sit around and laugh. I'll be
right back!

She's off after the cat and out of sight before I
can respond.

A considerable amount of time later, I spot her
sprinting back toward me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Sorry for the wait, but I got your phone back!

Fuji Kiseki is sopping wet, with a puddle of water
growing at her feet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Sorry for alarming you. It's kind of a long
story, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff... My word, you are one nimble cat, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Watch out, kitty! There's a lake over there!
Plop!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Did you... Did you just drop the phone in there?!
You might be cute, but you sure are trouble!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ack, I'd better fish out the phone before it's a
goner!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So that's the long and short of it. But don't worry!
I'm not as drenched as I appear. My undershirt is
still bone dry!

She flashes me a disarming smile, but the sweat
on her forehead tells me just how daunting her
chase was.
choice_data_list: Hurry and buy her a change of clothes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! You don't have to give me a drink! I
went looking for it because I wanted to, that's all!
choice_data_list:
Even so, you did a lot and need to stay
hydrated.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point... Haha. I didn't realize it till
now, but I'm parched!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thank you! It was very refreshing.
choice_data_list: And thank you for going to such lengths for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Your clothes are all dirty because of that wild
cat chase.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're right! I'm covered in mud... What a
state I'm in.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was so focused on getting your phone back that
I got total tunnel vision.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I must look pretty pathetic right now, huh?
choice_data_list: Not at all. I'm grateful for your help.

text_block_list.text:
To think Fuji Kiseki, who's usually so well put
together, would literally crawl through the mud
for me... It's just too touching.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You are? Somehow, it's embarrassing hearing you
say that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But... yeah, it makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's strange, but I always want to look my best in
front of you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But since it brought back your beautiful smile, I'll
gladly wear this bedraggled look like a badge of
honor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: For your smile is my treasure.

She smiles at me, soft and warm, and we admire
the sunset in amiable silence.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure I can use this? I'm covered in mud,
you know.
choice_data_list: Of course I'm sure! That's what it's for!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Then, thank you! I'll return it tomorrow
after I wash it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That feels so much better. I love how fluffy
your towel is.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It smells nice too... The scent is so gentle and
calming.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess you don't notice since you're used
to it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, I heard that you're more genetically
compatible with people whose scent you like.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I think it might be true.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I did dive headfirst into a murky lake for you
without hesitation, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I think about it that way... you may be even
more important to me than I imagined.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. No need to get so embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Say, Trainer... What am I to you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Do you find my scent pleasing as well?

The next day, I find my towel waiting for me in my
office, folded up nice and neat.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're gonna go buy some for me?! It's all right! You don't have to go out of your way to do that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really, I'm fine. I'll be dry again in no time.

Despite her reassurances, I'd still hate for her to
catch a cold.
choice_data_list: I'll be right back, so wait here!

text_block_list.text:
I run to the nearest convenience store and hurry
back, only to find...

I obviously can't change her clothes myself, but I
can't just leave her there either. I also wouldn't
want to wake her up.
I decide to carry her home on my back.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Wha?! T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Sorry. I must've fallen asleep while I was
waiting.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I felt someone picking me up, but in my
half-asleep state, I thought it was my mother.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Your back felt so sturdy and warm... It
reminded me of a time my mother carried me,
long ago.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I must've mistaken you for her because you're just
as important to me as she is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. That was weird, wasn't it. I must still be
muddled with sleep.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, we'd better hurry home. Get it together,
Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Please pretend that didn't happen.

Fuji Kiseki is unsteady on her feet, so I support
her all the way back to the academy.
